scope: Cycle 11: Bug hunt C10 (rune activation in encounter_card_overlay.gd) + life status strip

bugs_found.description: _ogham_used flag set BEFORE await dispatch, preventing recovery if dispatch fails. Choice buttons were never disabled during ogham activation, allowing race condition where user clicks choice during async ogham dispatch.
bugs_found.fix: Moved _ogham_used=true to AFTER successful dispatch. Choice buttons now disabled during activation and re-enabled on both success and failure paths.

bugs_found.description: Button cast from _ogham_id_map without null or validity checks. Could crash if map contains invalid entries.
bugs_found.fix: Added null check (if b and ...) on failure path, is_instance_valid() on success path.

bugs_found.description: Three const declarations used := syntax (forbidden by project conventions). _FIELD_LABELS, _FIELD_COLORS, _OGHAM_CAT_COLORS.
bugs_found.fix: Replaced := with explicit Dictionary type annotation.

overall_assessment: Cycle 11: 1 CRITICAL + 1 HIGH + 1 MEDIUM bug fixed in rune activation logic. Life status strip added for gameplay feedback. 28 total bugs fixed across 11 cycles.
